name: The Great Tribulation Bake Sale
text:
Whenever a snack is eaten at the table, you gain 2 life and may remove a doom counter from the Doomsday Clock. Fundraising for the end times goes surprisingly well.
{3}, {T}: Create a Food token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: You gain 3 life.")
flavorText: All proceeds go toward a future that, per the flyer, will not exist.
